title: Tiny Allies
description: Find baby monsters, tame them, and build youself a tiny army!
body:
**
** ### Ever wish you could adopt a hostile mob? ## The Tiny Allies are here!
### Currently supported entities: Creeper, Enderman, Skeleton, Spider, and Zombie. ***(Mob variants will be introduced in later updates)*** # Find new baby monsters!    Every time one of the supported entities spawns it has a chance of being a baby, if the baby monster doesn't have a parent around, you can **tame them and become their family!**
***
(Be gentle though, they might get scared)*** # Tame them!
### To tame the baby monsters, you'll need to feed them: *(Subject to change, based on feedback)*
**Creeper** - Gunpowder;
**Enderman** - Chorus Fruit;
**Skeleton** - Bone Meal;
**Spider & Zombie** - Any meat; # Gear them Up! ### The tiny allies will protect and fight for you! Zombies and skeletons can be strengthened by equipping armor and weapons! Helmets also protect them from getting sunburned. # Become a Military Power!
###
